description: Build and submit one iOS app to App Store

userStories.title: Trend research + idea selection
acceptanceCriteria: Contains: rank, idea, one_liner, platform, problem_statement, target_user, feasibility, overall_score, monetization_model, competition_notes, mvp_scope, next_step
At least 5 ideas evaluated, top 1 selected

userStories.title: Product planning
acceptanceCriteria: Contains: target user, problem, solution, monetization, MVP scope
userStories.notes: App: AffirmFlow - AI-powered affirmation widget using Foundation Models

userStories.title: Market research
userStories.notes: 6 competitors analyzed (ThinkUp, I Am, Innertune, Shine, Gratitude, Vision Board++). TAM $9.45B, SAM $94.5M, SOM $4.7M. Market score 7.5/10 - GO.

userStories.title: Spec generation
userStories.notes: 7 spec documents generated: PRD, ARCHITECTURE, UX_SPEC, DESIGN_SYSTEM, IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE, TEST_SPEC, RELEASE_SPEC

userStories.title: iOS implementation
acceptanceCriteria: <AppName>ios/ directory exists with App/, Views/, Models/, Services/, Resources/
userStories.notes: AffirmFlowios/ created with full SwiftUI + SwiftData implementation. 5 Views (Onboarding, Home, Favorites, History, Settings), Widget Extension, mock subscription service. Build verified with xcodebuild on iPhone 17 Pro simulator.

userStories.title: Testing
acceptanceCriteria: Unit tests exist for Models and Services
userStories.notes: 5 test files created (FocusAreaTests, AffirmationTests, UserSettingsTests, AffirmationServiceTests, SubscriptionServiceTests). Swift Testing framework with @Test and #expect. All 69 test cases passed on iPhone 17 Pro simulator.

userStories.title: App Store preparation (6.1-6.12)
acceptanceCriteria: privacy-policy.md exists and deployed to GitHub Pages
Screenshots generated via Pencil MCP and uploaded to ASC
Metadata synced to ASC via asc-metadata-sync
Slack notification sent to C091G3PKHL2: TestFlight ready
userStories.notes: PARTIAL: privacy-policy.md created, app icon generated, Fastlane configured, bundle IDs registered, screenshots created (1290x2796). BLOCKED: App creation in ASC requires Apple ID credentials (asc apps create --apple-id --password). Set APPLE_ID and APPLE_ID_PASSWORD env vars to continue.

userStories.title: App Store submission (6.13-6.14)
acceptanceCriteria: Slack notification sent to C091G3PKHL2: need App Privacy setup
.app-privacy-done file exists (human created after ASC Web setup)
Slack notification sent to C091G3PKHL2: WAITING_FOR_REVIEW
